Interface ClientRemoteInterface

All Superinterfaces:
Remote
All Known Implementing Classes:
ClientSocketProxy, ClientVirtualView
public interface ClientRemoteInterface extends Remote
Remote interface implemented by each Mesos client. The server calls these methods to push game-state updates (phase changes, market refreshes, player actions, errors) back to the client, both via RMI stubs and via the ClientSocketProxy.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    actionAvailableChanged(ActionDTO action)
    Notifies the client of the updated draw counts for the current player's offer tile.
    void
    addedCardToTribe(String nickname, CardDTO cardDTO)
    Notifies the client that a tribe card was added to the given player's tribe.
    void
    askExtraDraw(List<CardDTO> snapshotCards, List<BuildingDTO> snapshotBuildings)
    Asks the client to select one extra card from the end-of-round market snapshot (draw-one-more building effect).
    void
    boardInitialize(List<OffertileDTO> offerTileList, List<DefaultTileDTO> defaultTileList)
    Sends the initial board state (offer tiles and default tiles) to the client.
    void
    bottomBuildRemoved(int position)
    Notifies the client that a building was removed from the bottom market row.
    void
    bottomCardRemoved(int position)
    Notifies the client that a card was removed from the bottom market row.
    void
    eraChanged(ERA newEra)
    Notifies the client that the game has advanced to a new era.
    void
    eventResolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
    Notifies the client that an event has been resolved.
    void
    gamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE gamePhase)
    Notifies the client that the game phase has changed.
    void
    gameWinners(List<PlayerDTO> playerDTOSWinner)
    Sends the list of winners when the game ends.
    void
    initializeGame(ERA currentEra, GAME_PHASE gamePhase, String PlayerToPlace, String PlayerToPlay)
    Sends the initial game state to the client at game start.
    void
    initializeMarket(List<CardDTO> topCards, List<CardDTO> bottomCards, List<BuildingDTO> topBuildings, List<BuildingDTO> bottomBuildings)
    Sends the initial market state (top/bottom card rows and top building row) to the client.
    void
    orderOnDefaultTile(List<PlayerDTO> orderOnDefaultTile)
    Notifies the client of the updated player order on the default tiles.
    void
    playerAdded(PlayerDTO playerAdded)
    Notifies the client that a new player has joined the lobby.
    void
    playerDisconnected(String nickname)
    Notifies the client that a player has disconnected from the game.
    void
    playerPlacedOnOffertile(String PlayerNickname, int offertilePosition)
    Notifies the client that a player placed their totem on an offer tile.
    void
    playerReconnected(String nickname)
    Notifies the client that a previously-disconnected player has reconnected.
    void
    playerToPlaceChanged(PlayerDTO playerChanged)
    Notifies the client which player must place their totem next.
    void
    playerToPlayChanged(PlayerDTO playerChanged)
    Notifies the client which player must resolve their offer-tile actions next.
    void
    playerUpdateFood(String nickname, int food)
    Notifies the client of an updated food total for the given player.
    void
    playerUpdatePP(String nickname, int PP)
    Notifies the client of an updated prestige-point total for the given player.
    void
    pong()
    Heartbeat response sent by the server after every ping.
    void
    sendRank(Map<Integer, List<String>> Leaderboard)
    Sends the global leaderboard to the client, keyed by player count.
    void

    Sends an error message to the client (e.g.
    void
    topBuildingRefreshed(List<BuildingDTO> topBuildingCards)
    Notifies the client that the top building row has been refreshed with new buildings.
    void
    topBuildRemoved(int position)
    Notifies the client that a building was removed from the top market row.
    void
    topCardRefreshed(List<CardDTO> topCards)
    Notifies the client that the top card row has been refreshed with new cards.
    void
    topCardRemoved(int position)
    Notifies the client that a card was removed from the top market row.

  • Method Details

    • initializeGame

      void initializeGame(ERA currentEra, GAME_PHASE gamePhase, String PlayerToPlace, String PlayerToPlay) throws RemoteException
      Sends the initial game state to the client at game start.
      Parameters:
      currentEra - the starting era.
      gamePhase - the starting game phase.
      PlayerToPlace - nickname of the first player to place their totem.
      PlayerToPlay - nickname of the first player to resolve actions.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • gameWinners

      void gameWinners(List<PlayerDTO> playerDTOSWinner) throws RemoteException
      Sends the list of winners when the game ends.
      Parameters:
      playerDTOSWinner - the ordered list of winning players.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerAdded

      void playerAdded(PlayerDTO playerAdded) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that a new player has joined the lobby.
      Parameters:
      playerAdded - DTO of the player who just joined.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • eraChanged

      void eraChanged(ERA newEra) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that the game has advanced to a new era.
      Parameters:
      newEra - the era that just started.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • gamePhaseChanged

      void gamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE gamePhase) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that the game phase has changed.
      Parameters:
      gamePhase - the new game phase.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerToPlaceChanged

      void playerToPlaceChanged(PlayerDTO playerChanged) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client which player must place their totem next.
      Parameters:
      playerChanged - DTO of the player whose turn it is to place.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerToPlayChanged

      void playerToPlayChanged(PlayerDTO playerChanged) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client which player must resolve their offer-tile actions next.
      Parameters:
      playerChanged - DTO of the player whose turn it is to play.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • actionAvailableChanged

      void actionAvailableChanged(ActionDTO action) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client of the updated draw counts for the current player's offer tile.
      Parameters:
      action - DTO carrying the remaining top-draw and bottom-draw counts.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • initializeMarket

      void initializeMarket(List<CardDTO> topCards, List<CardDTO> bottomCards, List<BuildingDTO> topBuildings, List<BuildingDTO> bottomBuildings) throws RemoteException
      Sends the initial market state (top/bottom card rows and top building row) to the client.
      Parameters:
      topCards - the initial top card row.
      bottomCards - the initial bottom card row.
      topBuildings - the initial top building row.
      bottomBuildings - the initial bottom building row.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • topCardRemoved

      void topCardRemoved(int position) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that a card was removed from the top market row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed card.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • topBuildRemoved

      void topBuildRemoved(int position) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that a building was removed from the top market row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed building.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • bottomCardRemoved

      void bottomCardRemoved(int position) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that a card was removed from the bottom market row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed card.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • bottomBuildRemoved

      void bottomBuildRemoved(int position) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that a building was removed from the bottom market row.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the removed building.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • topCardRefreshed

      void topCardRefreshed(List<CardDTO> topCards) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that the top card row has been refreshed with new cards.
      Parameters:
      topCards - the new top card row.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • topBuildingRefreshed

      void topBuildingRefreshed(List<BuildingDTO> topBuildingCards) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that the top building row has been refreshed with new buildings.
      Parameters:
      topBuildingCards - the new top building row.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerUpdateFood

      void playerUpdateFood(String nickname, int food) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client of an updated food total for the given player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the affected player's nickname.
      food - the player's new food total.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerUpdatePP

      void playerUpdatePP(String nickname, int PP) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client of an updated prestige-point total for the given player.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the affected player's nickname.
      PP - the player's new prestige-point total.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • addedCardToTribe

      void addedCardToTribe(String nickname, CardDTO cardDTO) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that a tribe card was added to the given player's tribe.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the affected player's nickname.
      cardDTO - the card that was added.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • boardInitialize

      void boardInitialize(List<OffertileDTO> offerTileList, List<DefaultTileDTO> defaultTileList) throws RemoteException
      Sends the initial board state (offer tiles and default tiles) to the client.
      Parameters:
      offerTileList - the list of offer tiles on the board.
      defaultTileList - the list of default tiles on the board.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerPlacedOnOffertile

      void playerPlacedOnOffertile(String PlayerNickname, int offertilePosition) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that a player placed their totem on an offer tile.
      Parameters:
      PlayerNickname - the nickname of the player who placed their totem.
      offertilePosition - zero-based index of the offer tile that was occupied.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • orderOnDefaultTile

      void orderOnDefaultTile(List<PlayerDTO> orderOnDefaultTile) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client of the updated player order on the default tiles.
      Parameters:
      orderOnDefaultTile - the new ordered list of players on the default tiles.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • askExtraDraw

      void askExtraDraw(List<CardDTO> snapshotCards, List<BuildingDTO> snapshotBuildings) throws RemoteException
      Asks the client to select one extra card from the end-of-round market snapshot (draw-one-more building effect). The lists carry exactly the cards that were available at round close, before the market refresh.
      Parameters:
      snapshotCards - the top card row at end of round.
      snapshotBuildings - the top building row at end of round.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • showErrorMessage

      void showErrorMessage(String errorMessage) throws RemoteException
      Sends an error message to the client (e.g. invalid action, not your turn).
      Parameters:
      errorMessage - a human-readable description of the error.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • eventResolved

      void eventResolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that an event has been resolved.
      Parameters:
      eventID - the unique identifier of the resolved event.
      eventType - the category of the resolved event.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • sendRank

      void sendRank(Map<Integer, List<String>> Leaderboard) throws RemoteException
      Sends the global leaderboard to the client, keyed by player count.
      Parameters:
      Leaderboard - a map from player count to the ordered list of leaderboard row strings.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerDisconnected

      void playerDisconnected(String nickname) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that a player has disconnected from the game. The client uses this to mark the player as DISCONNESSO in the UI.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the disconnected player.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • playerReconnected

      void playerReconnected(String nickname) throws RemoteException
      Notifies the client that a previously-disconnected player has reconnected.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player who reconnected.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.

    • pong

      void pong() throws RemoteException
      Heartbeat response sent by the server after every ping. Guarantees traffic on the socket so the client's read timeout does not fire on idle connections.
      Throws:
      RemoteException - if the RMI call fails.
